strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with exact primary tech match (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and proven architecture capabilities across senior roles
Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators—directly addressing the 'required' AI agent development skill
Strong testing culture (TDD practice, workshops, testing framework expertise) and demonstrated ability to build high-performance systems handling millions of requests
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js/TypeScript background; evidence is Jest-focused rather than Vitest
Cloud platform experience limited to AWS CDK; no mention of GCP or Azure depth, and Kubernetes exposure appears infrastructure-focused rather than development-integrated
Java/Kotlin experience is 6+ years old (National Instruments 2014–2015, Altom 2016–2018); primary recent work uses D, TypeScript, and JavaScript

key_factors.factor: Full-stack experience depth and primary stack alignment

response.justification: Aisha is a significantly overqualified candidate with 13+ years of full-stack development and current direct experience in AI-agent infrastructure—a rare match for the job's required skills. TypeScript, Node.js, and React expertise are well-established. The primary gap is Nest.js, which appears learnable given deep Node.js/TypeScript proficiency. Secondary concerns (Vitest, Java/Kotlin recency, cloud breadth) are minor in context of demonstrated problem-solving and architectural maturity. Educational credentials and communication skills evident through workshops and open-source contributions.
